name: BaseCaseMultiply
label: Algorithm 12

inputs.name: a0
inputs.description: Constant term of first degree-1 polynomial, modulo q

inputs.name: a1
inputs.description: X coefficient of first degree-1 polynomial, modulo q

inputs.name: b0
inputs.description: Constant term of second degree-1 polynomial, modulo q

inputs.name: b1
inputs.description: X coefficient of second degree-1 polynomial, modulo q

inputs.name: gamma
inputs.description: Modulus parameter for X^2 - gamma, modulo q

outputs.name: c0
outputs.description: Constant term of the product polynomial, modulo q

outputs.name: c1
outputs.description: X coefficient of the product polynomial, modulo q

body_raw: c0 <- a0 * b0 + a1 * b1 * gamma mod q
c1 <- a0 * b1 + a1 * b0 mod q
